zh.lifeSummary: 當Olivier de Dinan於1088年出生在法國布列塔尼迪南時，他的父親Geoffrey de Dinan27歲，母親Radegonde Nerondes20歲。他和Elizabeth至少有4個兒子。他去世於1150年在英國英格蘭戴文哈特藍德享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olivier de Dinan于1088年出生在法国布列塔尼迪南时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Dinan27岁，母亲Radegonde Nerondes20岁。他和Elizabeth至少有4个儿子。他去世于1150年在英国英格兰戴文哈特藍德享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (now mainly counties Clare and Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Daghnáin ‘descendant of Daghnán’, possibly a diminutive of dagh ‘good’.
French: habitational name from Dinan, in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Dineen
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnín ‘descendant of Duinnín’, a byname from a diminutive of donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’.

nameMeanings.name: Olivier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Olivier de Dinan was born in 1088, in Dinan, Brittany, France, his father, Geoffrey de Dinan, was 27 and his mother, Radegonde Nerondes, was 20. He had at least 4 sons with Elizabeth. He died in 1150, in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olivier de Dinan est né en 1088, à Dinan, Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffrey de Dinan, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Radegonde Nerondes, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Elizabeth. Il est décédé en 1150, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olivier de Dinan 1088 in Dinan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Dinan 27 und seine Mutter Radegonde Nerondes 20. Er hatte mit Elizabeth mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1150 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olivier de Dinan è nato il nel 1088 nel Dinan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Dinan, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Radegonde Nerondes, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Elizabeth. Morì nel 1150, nel Hartland, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olivier de Dinanが1088年にフランスブレタグンディナンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Dinanは27歳，母Radegonde Nerondesは20歳であった。彼はElizabethとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1150年にイギリスイギリスデボンハートランドで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olivier de Dinan(이)가 1088년 프랑스 브레타그니 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Dinan(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Radegonde Nerondes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olivier de Dinan nasceu em 1088, em Dinan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geoffrey de Dinan, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Radegonde Nerondes, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Elizabeth. Ele faleceu em 1150, em Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olivier de Dinan родился в 1088 г. в местности динан, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Dinan было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Radegonde Nerondes, 20. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Elizabeth. Он умер в 1150 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olivier de Dinan nació en 1088, en Dinan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey de Dinan, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Radegonde Nerondes, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Elizabeth. Murió en 1150, en Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
